This is from a newer vmcore file that I generated with
kldload ipfw;kldstat
so I could work out where the ipfw.ko module was loaded and assign a suitable address when I manually added it's symbols:
add-symbol-file /usr/lib/debug/boot/kernel/ipfw.ko.debug 0xffff0000540c2000
